Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2010 "ONTRACKRACING-0400-2010" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "On-Track Computer Model Car Racing (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 which: 1. Disables raster and CIA #1 interrupts 2. Sets CIA #2 Port A data direction register ($DD02) 3. Sets the correct bitmap settings 4. Re-enables raster interrupts
